attributes.action: Introduce tougher sentencing and monitoring for convicted child sex offenders
attributes.background: We want the Government to review laws in England and Wales to introduce tougher prison sentences for child sex offenders, mandatory rehabilitation and risk assessments before release, and stronger long-term monitoring or public safeguarding measures to prevent reoffending.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Review punishment of Child Sex Offences
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746131

Reform bail, sentencing and sex offender registration for child sexual offences
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/755617
